item.title: LEGO DOTS Big Box 41960 Arts and Crafts Set for Kids Aged 6 Plus DIY Desk Tidy Organizer or Toy Jewelry Storage Tray Decoration Creative Activity
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO DOTS Big Box 41960 Arts and Crafts Set for Kids Aged 6 Plus DIY Desk Tidy Organizer or Toy Jewelry Storage Tray Decoration Creative Activity here: ℹ️: Arts-and-crafts treat for ages 6+ – Any creative DIY fan will love this customizable Set. The storage box, removable lid and colorful tiles will make a fun gift for kids with a passion for crafts Make it, design it, use it – Surprise any kid or arts-and-crafts fan with this LEGO DOTS Big Box (41960) craft Set.

item.title: LEGO Friends Heartlake City Bus 41759 Creative Building Toy for Ages 7+ Includes a Buildable Bus Mobility Scooter and 3 Mini Dolls A Fun Birthday Gift for Kids Who Love Role Play
item.description: You’ve got LEGO Friends Heartlake City Bus 41759 Creative Building Toy for Ages 7+ Includes a Buildable Bus Mobility Scooter and 3 Mini Dolls A Fun Birthday Gift for Kids Who Love Role Play at the following link: ℹ️: A helping hand – Discover intuitive instructions in the LEGO Builder app, where builders can zoom in and rotate models in 3D, track their progress and save sets as they develop new skills 3 characters and accessories – The set comes with LEGO Friends characters Paisley, plus the bus driver and a passenger with a mobility scooter Accessories – The accessories let kids create new stories each time they play and include a mobility scooter, ramp, pretend ‘electric’ charger, book, sunglasses and a smartphone Sized for young builders – The LEGO Friends Heartlake City Bus measures over 4 in.
